title: eryngium ebracteatum var. typicum
intro: Eryngium ebracteatum var. typicum, also known as Eryngium ebracteatum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, commonly referred to as sea holly. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Eryngium ebracteatum var. typicum include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, reduce inflammation, and promote digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for various forms of consumption to harness its medicinal properties.
